# Python Basic Webserver

Minimal Flask server with health endpoint and Docker support

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Web Server Templates |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Tools** | dev-python |
| **Website** | [https://flask.palletsprojects.com](https://flask.palletsprojects.com) |
| **Docs** | [https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/](https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/) |

## About

A minimal Python web server using Flask with a health check endpoint, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow. Ideal for microservices and API backends.
